rows.notes: P81 starts only after the landed P80 handoff-sync sidecar.
The locked-fact rebaseline should run on the dedicated p81 execution branch.
The post-P80 prompts should record the current published p75 head and the green standing audits.
Top-level docs and routers should expose P81 as the current locked-fact and promotion-prep phase.
The current-stage driver and branch registry should expose the p81 execution branch and keep dirty-root integration out of bounds.
The design and the plan/milestone routers should expose the P81 phase as current.
The standing release-preflight and archive-ready audits should remain green during the rebaseline.
